title: Open the All Contacts screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Contacts' section.

title: Click on the FAB to add a new contact
test_steps: Click on the floating action button (FAB) with the plus sign.
expected_result: A new contact form is displayed.

title: Search for a non-existent contact
test_steps: Click on the search bar. | Type 'John Doe' into the search bar. | Press enter.

title: Add a new contact with valid data
test_data: First Name: John | Last Name: Doe | Phone Number: 1234567890
test_steps: Click on the FAB to add a new contact. | Enter 'John' in the first name field. | Enter 'Doe' in the last name field. | Enter '1234567890' in the phone number field. | Click on the 'Save' button.
expected_result: The contact 'John Doe' is added to the contact list.

title: Delete a contact
test_steps: Navigate to the 'All Contacts' screen. | Locate and click on the contact 'John Doe'. | Click on the 'Delete' option for the contact 'John Doe'. | Confirm the deletion.
expected_result: The contact 'John Doe' is removed from the contact list.

title: Navigate through the bottom navigation bar
test_steps: Click on the 'Favorite' icon in the bottom navigation bar. | Click on the 'Recents' icon in the bottom navigation bar. | Click on the 'Contacts' icon in the bottom navigation bar. | Click on the 'Keypad' icon in the bottom navigation bar. | Click on the 'Settings' icon in the bottom navigation bar.
expected_result: The app navigates to the respective sections as expected.

title: Check for data persistence after app restart
test_steps: Exit the app. | Restart the app. | Navigate to the 'All Contacts' screen.
expected_result: The contact list is still populated with existing contacts.
